basics.name: Youngjae Cho
basics.label: ML Research Scientist
basics.summary: ML Research Scientist working on trustworthy & robust learning — alignment, prompts, active learning. M.S. from KAIST (ICML, AAAI).

highlights: Winner — NVIDIA Nemotron Hackathon, Track B (Domain-Specialized Model), 2026
First-author research on GAPO — geometry-aware preference alignment for LLMs
Unified LLM benchmarking CLI (throughput, latency, pipeline stability)
Pluggable engine abstraction (vLLM, Hugging Face, synthetic fallback for GPU-less CI)
Built diffusion-based data synthesis pipeline for anomaly detection (F1: 0.30 → 0.67)
Enabled 2048x2048 training within 24GB VRAM via Flash Attention + DeepSpeed
Developed OCR pipeline with Triton serving, TensorRT optimization, and test-time augmentation

publications.name: Learning Where It Matters: Geometric Anchoring for Robust Preference Alignment
publications.summary: First author. Geometry-aware preference optimization for LLMs.

publications.name: Background-Aware Defect Generation for Robust Industrial Anomaly Detection
publications.summary: First author. Diffusion-based defect synthesis with background-aware disentanglement.

publications.name: Make Prompts Adaptable: Bayesian Modeling for Vision-Language Prompt Learning with Data-Dependent Prior
publications.summary: First author. Bayesian prompt learning with per-image data-dependent priors.

publications.name: SAAL: Sharpness-Aware Active Learning
publications.summary: Co-first author. Active learning via loss-landscape sharpness.

portfolio.name: 🏆 NVIDIA Nemotron Hackathon — Track B Winner
portfolio.description: Domain-Specialized Model track at NVIDIA Nemotron Developer Day Seoul 2026. Video-safety evaluation system on NVIDIA's lightweight Nemotron LLM.

portfolio.name: GAPO: Geometric Anchor Preference Optimization
portfolio.description: Geometry-aware preference alignment for LLMs. First-author.

portfolio.name: APP: Bayesian Prompt Learning (AAAI 2024)
portfolio.description: Vision-language prompt learning with data-dependent Bayesian priors.

portfolio.name: SAAL: Sharpness-Aware Active Learning (ICML 2023)
portfolio.description: Active learning via loss-landscape geometry. Co-first author.

portfolio.name: LLM Benchmarking CLI
portfolio.description: Unified benchmarking CLI with pluggable engine adapters and automated pass/fail reports.

portfolio.name: Industrial Data Synthesis Pipeline
portfolio.description: Diffusion-based synthesis with Flash Attention + DeepSpeed. F1: 0.30 → 0.67.

portfolio.name: OCR Serving Pipeline
portfolio.description: End-to-end OCR on Triton with TensorRT and test-time augmentation.
